tagline: Shrinks video to whatever size you need, right on your device.

privacy.local: Your file never leaves this device.
privacy.clean: No accounts, no analytics, no cookies.
privacy.installable: Installable as an app, works offline.

dropzone.prompt: Drop a video here, or click to choose one
dropzone.formats: MP4, MOV, WebM, MKV, and more

controls.forceH264: Force H.264 (maximum compatibility, lower quality at this size)

convert.refineNote: First pass overshot the target. Re-encoding once more for accuracy.

errors.shareTimeout: Gave up waiting for the shared video. Try picking the file directly instead.
errors.shareNeverArrived: The shared video never arrived from the system. Try picking the file directly instead.
errors.shareFailed: Could not receive the shared video ({{message}}). Try picking the file directly instead.

footer.note: Encoding runs via WebCodecs, with an ffmpeg fallback where it isn't supported.
